sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Is it a good time to purchase the popular stock Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX)?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has seen an 18.4% decline in shares over the last month, a period where the broader Mining - Non Ferrous sector also experienced significant losses. Despite recent stock drops, fundamental analysis, including positive earnings and revenue growth projections, suggests potential for the company. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating it may perform in line with the broader market.

feed.title: Eaton Fire recovery reaches 2,810 claimants with nearly $380M in offers
feed.summary: Southern California Edison (SCE) has reached a significant milestone in its Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program, extending 1,125 offers totaling nearly $380 million to 2,810 claimants impacted by the Eaton Fire. The program, designed for streamlined and faster compensation than litigation, has already paid over $52 million to more than 400 claimants and remains open for submissions until November 30, 2026. This initiative highlights SCE's commitment to supporting the community's recovery efforts.

feed.title: Trump calls on John Deere, Case and Caterpillar to cut equipment costs
feed.summary: Former President Donald Trump has urged major agricultural equipment manufacturers like John Deere, CNH Industrial, and Caterpillar to lower the costs of their machinery for farmers. He made this call at a White House event where he also announced new loan guarantees for farmers and food suppliers, an update to renewable fuel standards, and a promise to seek further congressional relief for agricultural communities. This initiative is part of a broader effort to support the agricultural sector.

feed.title: Refresh your shopping routine with a Costco Gold Star Membership + $20 for later
feed.summary: Costco is offering a 1-year Gold Star Membership for $65, which includes a $20 Digital Costco Shop Card. This promotion is designed for new members or those whose memberships have been expired for at least 18 months, providing access to a wide range of products and services, including groceries, home goods, gas stations, and tire services. The membership also comes with a free Household Card and aims to simplify everyday shopping routines with quality products and convenient extras.

feed.title: Why Are Adobe Shares Sliding On Friday?
feed.summary: Adobe (ADBE) shares are falling on Friday following a downgrade from William Blair analyst Arjun Bhatia due to growing concerns about the software sector and potential AI-driven disruption to traditional SaaS models. The stock is also facing technical headwinds, trading significantly below its moving averages, and is near its 52-week low. Furthermore, Google's Stitch redesign poses a competitive threat, especially after its recent unveiling caused a dip in Adobe shares on March 18.

feed.title: TD Cowen Satisfied With Chipotle Mexican Grill’s (CMG) Progress
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Andrew Charles recently reaffirmed a Buy rating and $44 price target for Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG), suggesting the company is on track to meet sales guidance despite industry-wide challenges. Other analysts, such as DA Davidson, hold an even more bullish outlook, initiating coverage with a $51 price target and anticipating CMG to surpass Wall Street estimates, leading to potential valuation multiple expansion for investors. Chipotle Mexican Grill operates restaurants globally, selling various Mexican-inspired food items.

feed.title: Short Interest in Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. (NYSE:BEP) Drops By 38.2%
feed.summary: Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. (NYSE:BEP) saw a significant 38.2% decrease in short interest during March, indicating reduced bearish sentiment. The company also announced a dividend increase to $0.392 per quarter and posted strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates with $0.54 EPS and $1.54 billion in revenue. Institutional investors maintain a strong presence, owning over 63% of the company, and analysts rate BEP with a "Moderate Buy" and an average target price of $35.21.

feed.title: Is Southern (SO) Offering Upside After Recent Share Price Softness
feed.summary: Southern (SO) stock closed at US$95.42, representing a 9.5% return over the year but experiencing slight declines recently. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 52.8% with an estimated intrinsic value of $202.05 per share. Additionally, Southern's current P/E ratio of 24.61x is below Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 27.99x, further indicating a potential undervaluation relative to its specific characteristics.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering $400,000 capped notes linked to the performance of the Russell 2000® Index and the Invesco QQQ Trust SM, Series 1, with a maximum return of 10.90% at maturity. The notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. and are designed for investors seeking exposure to the appreciation of the lesser performing of the two underlying assets, while maintaining full principal repayment at maturity.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To General Dynamics (GD) Securing a US$15.4 Billion Columbia-Class Support Deal
feed.summary: General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp. secured a US$15.38 billion U.S. Navy contract modification for Columbia-class submarine support, extending through June 2035. This deal enhances the company's long-term revenue visibility and reinforces its position in defense, impacting its investment narrative. Investors are encouraged to consider how the expanding order book will convert into sustained cash generation amidst ongoing supply chain challenges.

feed.title: Here’s why TD Cowen reiterated its buy rating on Yum Brands (YUM) stock
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reiterated its Buy rating on Yum Brands (YUM) stock. This decision reflects the firm's positive outlook on the company's performance, indicating continued confidence in the quick-service restaurant giant.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; CRM ownership reported as 0% (Vanguard)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 10 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership of Salesforce Inc (CRM) common stock. This change is attributed to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, under SEC Release No. 34-39538, causing certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report ownership separately. The filing emphasizes that this represents a reporting structure change rather than a transactional change in economic exposure.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; parent reports 0% in Rockwell Automation (ROK)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A report for Rockwell Automation Inc. (ROK), indicating zero beneficial ownership. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries now report their holdings disaggregated from the parent company. As a result, Vanguard no longer beneficially owns these securities, and future holdings will be disclosed in separate filings by the reporting subsidiaries.

feed.title: Small-Cap ETFs Set to Outperform After Fed Rate Cuts
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve has cut interest rates by 50 basis points, with further cuts anticipated, which is expected to benefit small-cap stocks. Small-cap companies, often burdened by debt with floating rates, will see reduced borrowing costs, stimulating growth and profitability. This makes small-cap ETFs an attractive investment, especially given their current attractive valuations compared to large caps and potential growth opportunities in areas like AI.

feed.title: Six-figure Starbucks jobs surface for planned Nashville office
feed.summary: Starbucks has begun posting job openings, including some six-figure positions, for its new corporate operations office planned for Nashville later this year. Multiple sources suggest the office could be as large as 250,000 square feet, potentially located at Peabody Union. The company is relocating roles from Seattle and actively hiring locally, as revealed by job listings circulated on March 27.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Saul Centers (804395101) shows 0% ownership
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed a Schedule 13G/A stating it beneficially owns 0 shares of Saul Centers Inc. common stock, representing 0% ownership, due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, on March 27, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard (SBAC) Amendment No.13: Disaggregated reporting after Jan 12, 2026 realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed Amendment No. 13 to a Schedule 13G/A for SBA Communications Corp (SBAC), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which disaggregated certain Vanguard subsidiaries' holdings, requiring them to report separately. The filing confirms that Vanguard no longer has beneficial ownership over these disaggregated securities, in accordance with SEC guidelines.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; RCL ownership shown as 0 (RCL)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares of Royal Caribbean (RCL) Common Stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this is a structural reporting change, not a dispositional sale of shares.

feed.title: Vanguard realignment leads to 0% SPG ownership (SPG)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has reported 0% beneficial ownership of Simon Property Group Inc. (SPG) common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which resulted in certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions reporting their ownership separately. The filing, an amendment to Schedule 13G/A, indicates that Vanguard no longer holds or is deemed to beneficially own securities held by these entities.

feed.title: Vanguard realignment leads to separate reports; Seagate (STX) shows 0 ownership
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed Amendment No. 14 to a Schedule 13G/A report, indicating 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of common stock in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC as of the filing. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which led to certain Vanguard subsidiaries or business divisions reporting their holdings separately. While Vanguard no longer reports direct beneficial ownership, its entities retain rights to dividends or proceeds for accounts they manage, and no single outside person holds more than 5% of the class.

feed.title: CoStar claims Zillow is still using over 50K copyrighted photos
feed.summary: CoStar has filed an amended complaint in its copyright infringement lawsuit against Zillow, alleging that Zillow is still using over 53,000 copyrighted images belonging to CoStar. CoStar claims Zillow has the ability to remove these images but is choosing not to, continuing to republish them on its platforms and through syndication deals. Zillow, in turn, suggests the lawsuit is an attempt by CoStar to misuse copyright law to disadvantage Zillow and maintain its market control.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Sempra (SRE) ownership shown as 0
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 12 to a Schedule 13G/A for Sempra (SRE), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% ownership following an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026. This change is administrative, disaggregating reporting for certain subsidiaries, and does not indicate a sale of shares but rather a shift in reporting method in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. Investors should look for subsequent filings from the disaggregated subsidiaries for their individual Sempra holdings.

feed.title: Vanguard (ROST) disaggregates holdings; reports zero beneficial ownership
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment (Schedule 13G/A) for Ross Stores Inc. (ROST), reporting zero beneficial ownership of Ross Stores common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment within Vanguard, effective January 12, 2026, where certain subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing clarifies that this is an administrative reporting change and not a sale or transaction involving Ross Stores shares.

feed.title: General Electric is in the throes a major reversal lower, says Carter Worth
feed.summary: Carter Worth suggests that General Electric (GE), despite an impressive 833% run since its 2022 lows, is now facing a significant "Bullish-to-Bearish" reversal. GE has recently underperformed its industry group, sector, and the broader S&P 500. The stock trading below its 150-day moving average, which is about to turn down, signals this reversal.

feed.title: Vanguard reorganizes reporting; subsidiaries to report SHW holdings (SHW)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A for Sherwin-Williams (SHW), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned due to an internal realignment. This change is in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538, which allows certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their holdings separately. The amendment clarifies that this is an administrative reclassification, not an economic sale, and actual positions will be reported by individual subsidiaries.

feed.title: Vanguard Group discloses 0% stake in Roper (ROP) after realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting a 0% beneficial ownership in Roper Technologies Inc. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries began reporting their holdings separately. As a result, Vanguard now disclaims beneficial ownership of the shares held by these subsidiaries.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Rollins (ROL) ownership shown as 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G stating it beneficially owns 0 shares and 0% of Rollins Inc. common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which led certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report ownership separately, rather than an economic transaction or sale of shares. The amendment clarifies that Vanguard no longer reports holdings for these disaggregated subsidiaries.

feed.title: [424B2] WELLS FARGO & COMPANY/MN Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has priced a series of senior unsecured medium-term notes totaling $1,000 per note, with an interest rate of 4.625% per annum, maturing on April 3, 2030, and redeemable by Wells Fargo starting April 3, 2028. The notes are unlisted and subject to Wells Fargo's credit risk, as detailed in the prospectus supplement, which also outlines tax considerations and distribution plans.

feed.title: NYSE Owner Completes $1.6 Billion Polymarket Stake With $600 Million Cash Injection
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), owner of the NYSE, has completed its $1.6 billion stake in Polymarket, injecting an additional $600 million in cash. This comes after an initial $1 billion investment and amidst a surge in institutional interest and volume in prediction markets. ICE will be the exclusive distributor of Polymarket’s event-driven data to institutional investors.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Digital Realty Trust Inc(DLR.US) With Hold Rating, Maintains Target Price $195
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated its "Hold" rating for Digital Realty Trust Inc (DLR.US) and maintained its price target at $195. This indicates a neutral outlook on the stock's performance in the near term, with no expected significant price movement from the analyst's perspective.

feed.title: Mizuho Reiterates on Autolus Therapeutics plc (AUTL): Ph1 readouts could show path forward
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Mara Goldstein reiterated an Outperform rating and $12.00 price target for Autolus Therapeutics plc (NASDAQ: AUTL), following the company's Q4 2025 earnings call. The analyst noted that Aucatzyl revenue was in line with expectations and guidance for 2026 remains unchanged. Key discussion points included Aucatzyl's launch and manufacturing, as well as upcoming Phase 1 readouts which could clarify the path forward for obe-cel in areas beyond B-ALL.

feed.title: AstraZeneca Expands DNA-Repair Oncology Pipeline With New AZD4956 Combination Trial
feed.summary: AstraZeneca has announced a new Phase I/IIa clinical trial for AZD4956, an oral drug targeting homologous recombination repair deficient solid tumors, both as a monotherapy and in combination with saruparib. This early-stage study aims to assess the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, and preliminary efficacy of the treatment. The trial reinforces AstraZeneca’s focus on precision oncology and DNA repair targets, signaling its long-term pipeline strategy rather than near-term revenue impact, given the high failure risk associated with early-stage oncology trials.

feed.title: Coinbase and Better Partner to Enable Token-Backed Mortgages
feed.summary: Coinbase has partnered with Better Home & Finance Holding Company to introduce token-backed mortgages, allowing qualifying Americans to use Bitcoin or USDC as collateral for their home down payments. This initiative aims to increase economic freedom and unlock homeownership for younger generations by transforming digital wealth into housing access. Better will originate and service these mortgages, which will be backed by Fannie Mae, while Coinbase handles the crypto pledges.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) Given Consensus Rating of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from eight brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $42.50. The company recently missed EPS estimates but beat revenue expectations, and institutional investors have been actively adjusting their stakes. LKQ currently offers a 4.1% dividend yield.

feed.title: Amazon.com (AMZN) Underperformed Despite Strong Positioning in AI and Cloud
feed.summary: Montaka Global Investments' Q4 2025 investor letter noted that Amazon.com (AMZN) underperformed the broader equity index in 2025, despite its strong position in AI and cloud computing. The fund views this underperformance as temporary, believing AMZN remains an attractive investment. Amazon is a global technology and e-commerce leader, and it was held by 381 hedge funds at the end of Q4 2025.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley gets Fed green light to realign German unit
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve Board has approved Morgan Stanley's request to incorporate its German investment bank into its holding company, allowing an exception to existing rules limiting transactions with overseas nonbank affiliates. While the bank argued this levels the competitive playing field, three Fed governors dissented, raising concerns about increased risk to the Deposit Insurance Fund and the potential for a dangerous precedent. Conversely, Fed Vice Chair Michelle Bowman stated that other large banks already operate with similar structures without issue, suggesting no new precedent is being set.

feed.title: Bicara Therapeutics Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
feed.summary: Bicara Therapeutics (NASDAQ: BCAX) is set to release its fourth-quarter earnings on March 30, with analysts expecting a wider loss per share of 65 cents compared to 39 cents in the prior year. Several financial analysts have recently updated their ratings and price targets for the company, including Buy ratings from B of A Securities and BTIG, an Outperform from Wedbush, a Neutral from Mizuho, and an Equal-Weight from Wells Fargo.

feed.title: Astrazeneca (NYSE:AZN) Shares Gap Up - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: AstraZeneca (NYSE:AZN) shares gapped up pre-market, opening at $190.88 and trading around $190.35, up about 3.6%. The company has received largely positive analyst sentiment, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a consensus price target of $95.75, backed by recent reiterations from firms like Morgan Stanley and Barclays. AstraZeneca also disclosed a dividend of $1.595, reflecting a 156.0% yield, and reported strong company metrics including a market cap of $294.5 billion.

feed.title: FCC adopts Verizon-backed order to ease procedure to decommission copper networks
feed.summary: The FCC has unanimously adopted an order supported by Verizon and the New Jersey Utilities Association to simplify the process of decommissioning copper networks. This move aims to accelerate the transition to modern fiber-optic and wireless networks, citing significant cost savings, energy efficiency, and improved reliability. The new order will eliminate some filing requirements and grant blanket authority to grandfather legacy copper services, allowing providers to focus on upgrading to more efficient technologies.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust’s $600 Million Share Repurchase Reflects Financial Prudence as It Invests in Sunbelt Expansion
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust has initiated a $600 million share repurchase program and increased its quarterly dividend amidst a leadership transition, with Alexander J. Jessett as CEO and Laurie A. Baker as President. The company is focusing on acquiring properties in the Sunbelt region for long-term growth, balancing shareholder returns with expansion funding. Despite market caution reflecting short-term challenges, the strategy aims to deliver FFO growth, though risks related to Sunbelt market performance and execution remain.

feed.title: Citizens’ Coughlin talks ‘overwhelming’ pace of AI change
feed.summary: Brendan Coughlin, President of Citizens, discussed the "overwhelming" pace of AI advancements as the bank is six months into its "Reimagine the Bank" initiative. He emphasized the need for banks to abandon the old mindset of setting plans for five years due to how rapidly AI tools become obsolete. Citizens is leveraging AI to transform operations, targeting $450 million in benefits by the end of 2028, with a significant focus on improving call center and engineering productivity.

feed.title: AXT Inc. Shares Skyrocket Amidst Insider Activity and Stock Surge
feed.summary: AXT Inc. (NASDAQ: AXTI) shares surged 6.86% driven by semiconductor industry developments and a positive earnings report, despite the company facing profitability challenges. Insider sales, including a $4.5 million sale by the CFO, are being interpreted as potential reinvestment opportunities by investors, rather than a red flag, leading to increased confidence and speculative growth. This scenario highlights the complex interplay between insider actions, market sentiment, and financial performance in the stock's recent trajectory.

feed.title: Argan (AGX) Is Down 14.4% After Record Backlog Expansion And Strong FY26 Results - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Argan, Inc. reported strong Q4 and full-year FY26 results with increased sales and net income, alongside a record US$2.90 billion project backlog, indicating robust demand for its energy infrastructure services. Despite these positive figures and recent S&P index inclusions, the stock saw a 14.4% drop, prompting a reevaluation of its investment narrative. Investors are focused on the company's ability to convert this backlog into profitable work without execution issues, particularly given its concentration in complex gas power projects.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Southwest Airlines (LUV) Dropping Fuel Hedges As Jet-Fuel Costs Surge
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines ended its fuel hedging program in early 2026, coinciding with a significant surge in jet-fuel prices, leaving the company more exposed to high operating costs. This move raises questions about Southwest's cost structure compared to competitors like Delta and could impact its near-term margins. Investors need to consider how the airline will offset these increased costs through new revenue initiatives and operational efficiencies, despite a solid balance sheet.

feed.title: Allogene Therapeutics advances CAR T therapy to expand access for patients
feed.summary: Allogene Therapeutics is making strides in CAR T therapy, aiming to revolutionize patient care through innovative cell therapy developments. The company is focused on improving access to advanced treatments and holds promise for patients with severe autoimmune diseases. This includes the introduction of ALLO-329, a next-generation CAR-T therapy utilizing its Dagger technology platform.

feed.title: Michigan grid plan approved to cut outages for 2 million customers
feed.summary: Consumers Energy (NYSE:CMS) has received approval from the Michigan Public Service Commission for its 2026 Reliability Action Plan, which aims to strengthen the electric grid for nearly 2 million homes and businesses. The plan allocates 75 cents of every customer dollar to grid improvements, including tree trimming, line burial, stronger poles, and enhanced security measures. This investment is projected to reduce outage times and build upon a 28% decrease in outages since 2021, with Consumers Energy also providing $5 million to nonprofits for bill assistance.

feed.title: Visa Inc Stock (V) Moved Down by 3.23% on Mar 27: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Visa Inc. (V) stock fell by 3.23% on March 27, reaching a 52-week low due to institutional and insider selling. Macroeconomic concerns about inflation and geopolitical risks, alongside increasing competition and regulatory scrutiny in the payments industry, are contributing to the downward pressure. Despite these challenges, analyst forecasts for Visa generally remain positive with "Buy" ratings.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc Class C Stock (GOOG) Moved Down by 4.19% on Mar 27: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc Class C (GOOG) stock dropped by 4.19% on March 27, driven by legal and regulatory challenges, including YouTube's liability in a social media addiction lawsuit and anticipated EU DMA non-compliance decisions. Investor concerns about high AI capital expenditures and "ROI fatigue" further pressured the stock, alongside broader tech sector corrections and negative sentiment from AI-related headlines and insider selling. Technically, GOOG shows sell signals with a MACD of [-4.50] and an RSI of 27.48.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp Stock (XOM) Moved Up by 3.00% on Mar 27: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp (XOM) saw a 3.00% increase in its stock price, driven primarily by rising crude oil and natural gas prices, particularly due to geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. Positive analyst sentiment, with firms like Morgan Stanley and Bernstein raising price targets, further supported the stock. However, the company faces risks from potential de-escalation of tensions and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Promotions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) has announced significant leadership changes, promoting Alexander J. Jessett to CEO, Laurie A. Baker to President and COO, and Benjamin D. Fraker to Executive Vice President – CFO and Treasurer. Co-founder Richard J. Campo will now serve as Executive Chairman, while co-founder D. Keith Oden continues as Executive Vice Chairman. These promotions align with the company's long-term succession plan, aiming to ensure strong leadership for future growth.
